Cita Flynn Goward @flynngoward · 9h En respuesta a @chrisgambler247 @PricedUpBet y @BetGameCouncil I think it's forgotten that remote operators already conduct financial vulnerability checks at £150 of net losses in a 30 day period. It's not classed as an 'affordability check' - I guess because the word 'affordability' doesn't appear in the LCCP section - but it's already a 363
